'''Le'Roche''' was an island on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Krant]].<ref name="SW:GB" /> Between [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] and [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the mission's events during that time period.</ref> the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Utric Sandov]] and [[Krantian/Legends|Krantian]] Resistance members retreated to the island after [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Strike force Alpha|Strike Force Alpha]] seized the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Ghost Base]]. The survivors established another base on Le'Roche, complete with a [[Command center]], [[prefab shelter]]s, a [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]], a [[War Center]], and a water-based [[Shipyard (water)|shipyard]]. [[R2-D5]] [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droids]] gathered resources for the base. After a Rebel [[Army/Legends|army]] led by the emissary [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and the exiled [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] liberated Ghost Base, the [[Krantian Leader]] sent two [[Transport Ship (Rebel Alliance)|transports]] to take Organa to meet with Sandov on Le'Roche. Sandov then informed them that the Empire had captured a [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]], the [[Vor'Na'Tu]], and Organa and Shen-Jon departed Krant to [[Battle of Geddes|recover]] the artifact.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Le'Roche was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] to the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The island was identified in the second Princess Leia campaign mission.
